headline: Taking On Elon Musk: This State Legislature Could Ban Electric Vehicle Sales By 2035
summary: While some states work to phase out internal combustion engine vehicles, one of the 50 U.S. states has a unique take on the future of the automotive sector. Here’s the latest.

headline: If You Invested $1,000 In Meta Stock When Donald Trump Was Kicked Off Facebook, You'd Have This Much Now
summary: Former President Donald Trump announced his plans to run for President of the United States for a third time on Nov. 15, 2022.
